entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The crop plant studied for yield loss due to pod-borer infestation.

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH, INDIA
entities.description: The region where the field experiments were conducted.

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: The pod-borer insect that causes damage to chickpea plants.

entities.name: FIELD EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: The experimental approach used to study the relationship between insect density and yield loss.

entities.name: INSECT DENSITY
entities.description: The concentration of Helicoverpa armigera to which the chickpea plants were exposed.

entities.name: GRAIN MASS PER PLANT
entities.description: A yield-related trait measured in the first experiment.

entities.name: POD DAMAGE
entities.description: The extent of damage to the pods caused by H. armigera at harvest.

entities.name: MEAN DRY MASS
entities.description: The average dry mass of the plants measured in the second experiment.
